justifications.temporal_understanding: The agent initially misunderstood the month, interpreting '14.03 or 15.03' as March instead of June, requiring a correction from the user.
justifications.negotiation_effectiveness: The agent effectively proposed alternative dates and times when the initial requests were unavailable, including checking the afternoons and then new specific dates.
justifications.conversational_efficiency: The agent made an unnecessary API call by checking for March 14th and 15th in the morning again in Turn 2, even though the user had clarified the month.
justifications.customer_experience: The customer experience was slightly hampered by the initial misunderstanding of the date, which required a clarification and an extra turn.
justifications.recovery_quality: The agent recovered well from the initial misunderstanding of the month, acknowledging the error and then correctly processing the new date requests.
